nonclaims: no registered candidate is structurally indispensable
the previous summaries are reproducible trial evidence
preserved_findings: The project authored preliminary observations for all twelve candidates.
Several concepts appear generic, architecture-sensitive, scope-sensitive, or primitively reconstructible.
These observations do not establish structural dispensability.

results.name: distinguishable_state_or_configuration
results.rationale: Presence in contrast systems refutes reasoning specificity, not structural necessity.

results.name: commitment_sensitive_state
results.rationale: Equivalent commitment is reconstructed; primitive independence may fail while structural necessity remains unresolved.

results.name: stakes_questions_or_live_alternatives
results.rationale: Objective-plus-transformation formulation may replace explicit naming; equivalence and cost remain untested.

results.name: grounds_constraints_or_dependency
results.rationale: Dependency commitment is reconstructed from other roles; structural necessity is not refuted.

results.name: admissibility_beyond_arbitrary_transition
results.rationale: Admissibility is reconstructed as constraints; the commitment may remain necessary.

results.name: consequence_sensitive_update
results.rationale: Update sensitivity is reconstructed from other roles; structural necessity remains unresolved.

results.name: history_or_path_dependence
results.rationale: Bare path dependence is generic, but reason-giving history may remain structurally necessary.

results.name: representation_denotation_separation
results.rationale: Explicit architectural separation varies by encoding; semantic-level separation remains unresolved.

results.name: semantic_interpretation
results.rationale: Scope and granularity are not fixed tightly enough for a terminal necessity result.

results.name: investigation_objective_or_problem_relativization
results.rationale: Occurrence in nonreasoning systems refutes specificity, not necessity for reasoning.

results.name: calculus_or_equivalent_transition_constraint
results.rationale: Generic transition constraints may still be necessary for nonarbitrary reasoning.

results.name: provenance_or_entitlement_structure
results.rationale: Equivalent entitlement structure is reconstructed; structural necessity is not refuted.
